先进的 bio指标 technologies will enable secure wallet 验证 through fingerprint 认证 and facial 识别 payment approval. Blockchain-based wallet 系统s may r演变ize 赌场 payments through immutable 交易 记录s and transparent 数字 wallet 历史.
